title: Opening for Logistics Manager at BigBasket Logistics

jsonLd.title: Opening for Logistics Manager at BigBasket Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with BigBasket Logistics! We are hiring a Logistics Manager for our Thane team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About BigBasket Logistics:
BigBasket Logistics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BigBasket Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
